content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES CoIIss1oN
P.O. Box 807
428 J Street
Sacramento. CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660
Fax (916) 322-0886
July 31, 2000
Fred Diaz
City Manager, City of Tracy
325 EastTenth Street
Tracy, California 95376
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 99-322
Dear Mr. Diaz:
On December 30, 1999, we received your request for formal written advice. During a
telephone conversation, you provided additional information on January 27, 2000. In a later
conversation, I advised you that in order to proceed with your request, we would need more
detailed information about the commuter train project and all of the various decisions in which
you would be participating. Otherwise, we could only issue informal advice. On March 16,
2000, you requested that we put the letter on hold until you could provide that information.
The Political Reform Act (the “Act”)’ requires the agency to issue formal written advice
within 21 business days after receiving a written request. (Section 83114.) In addition,
Commission regulations require the agency to make every reasonable effort to provide formal
written advice without unnecessary delay and in sufficient time to facilitate compliance with the
Act. (Regulation 18329(a).) The 21-day time line, however, may be extended for good cause,
and the Commission may decline to give formal written adviceif it appears that the material facts
in the request are incomplete. (Section 83114; Regulation 1 8329(b)(8)(C).)
Four months have passed since we placed the letter on hold. We have waited a
reasonable amount of time to proceed with your request. Last month, I informed you that we
may withdraw your request unless we received the additional facts. Please be informed that if we
do not hear from you by August 15, 2000, we will withdraw your request for formal written
advice. However, this will not preclude you from seeking formal written advice in the future.
Government Code sections 81000
- 91015. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 -
18996, of the California Code of Regulations.


File No. 1-99-322
Page 2
For your guidance, I have enclosed a Conflict of Interest Fact Sheet. If you have any
questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-7776.
Sincerely,
Julia Bilaver
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
